description.content: Create, retrieve, update, and delete pages

Returns all pages. The number of results is limited by the limit parameter and additional results can be retrieved via the next cursor. Results can be filtered by space, status, title, and body format.

query.description: Filter by page IDs. Multiple IDs can be specified as comma-separated values.
Filter by page IDs. Multiple IDs can be specified as comma-separated values.
Filter by space ID. Multiple IDs can be specified.

Filter by content title. Supports exact match.
The representation format for the content body.
Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields include id, title, created-date, and modified-date.
Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.
Maximum number of results to return.

Your Atlassian Cloud site domain

Next generation REST API for Confluence Cloud providing access to pages, spaces, comments, blog posts, attachments, labels, and other content management operations. This API offers improved performance, consistent pagination, and new features compared to the v1 API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Atlassian
 Email: ecosystem@atlassian.com
